subject: Re: FW: college or university attended
body:
I have resigned from the board

--- Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com> wrote:

>

> From: Steinberg, Margot [mailto:MSteinberg@iie.org]

> To: Lesley Groff
> Subject: college or university attended
> 
> 
>

> of information. Where
> did Mr. Epstein attend College or University?
>  
> You were going to get back to me.
> 
> Thank you. 
> Margot 
>   
> Margot  Steinberg 
> Chief  Development  Officer, Scholar Rescue Fund 
> Institute of International Education 
> msteinberg@iie.org 
> 809 United Nations Plaza 
> New York, NY 10017 
> 212-984-5310 
> www.scholarrescuefund.org
> "We will not walk in fear, one of another. We will
> not be driven by fear
> into an age of unreason if we dig deep in our
> history and doctrine and
> remember that we are not descended from fearful men,
> not from men who
> feared to write, to speak, to associate and to
> defend causes which were
> for the moment unpopular." Edward R. Murrow

I have resigned from the board

did Mr. Epstein attend College or University?

You were going to get back to me.

Margot

defend causes which were
